evals.query: Use subagents to implement these four independent features in parallel.
expected_behavior: Acts as orchestrator: decomposes the work and fans out one subagent per independent piece
Gives each subagent a self-contained brief with the context it needs and the exact libraries/versions involved
Instructs each subagent to pull fresh docs via Context7
Verifies each subagent's output rather than assuming success, and reports failures plainly
Does NOT write all the implementation itself in one linear pass

evals.query: Parallelize this large refactor across many files.
expected_behavior: Splits the refactor into independent workstreams and dispatches subagents
Uses worktree isolation when agents mutate files in parallel to avoid conflicts
Keeps the orchestrator in the loop, collecting and verifying results

evals.query: Rename this one variable from foo to bar in this file.
expected_behavior: Does NOT spin up subagents, the orchestration overhead is not worth it for a tiny change
